longDescription:
ChatJump turns each key into a one-tap shortcut to a specific WhatsApp or Telegram conversation. No searching, no scrolling your chat list - press the key and the exact chat opens in the desktop app.

## Actions

- **WhatsApp Chat** - opens a direct conversation by phone number (international format) straight in WhatsApp Desktop.
- **Telegram Chat** - opens a conversation by @username, phone number, or private group invite link, straight in Telegram Desktop.

## Highlights

- **Direct app launch** - keys open the messenger app itself via its URL scheme, not a browser tab.
- **Groups (Telegram)** - jump to a public group/channel by @username, or a private group via its invite link (https://t.me/+...).
- **Contact photo + app badge** - set any photo as the key icon; a small WhatsApp or Telegram badge is added to the corner so you always know which app the key opens.
- **Bilingual** - interface localized in English and Portuguese (pt_PT).

## Requirements

- WhatsApp Desktop (or WhatsApp) installed for WhatsApp keys.
- Telegram Desktop installed for Telegram keys.

Note: WhatsApp only exposes direct (1:1) chats through its desktop URL scheme, so ChatJump supports WhatsApp direct chats and Telegram chats + groups.
